calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Change Of Venue; Mem. Of P. And A.; Zelenski Decl.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Abigail Zelenski, Esq. (818-630-7280) of Jaurigue Law Group for Defendant through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RESOURCEFUL DEVELOPMENTS INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue is GRANTED. The case is transferred to Los Angeles County Superior Court. Plaintiff Northern California Collection Service, Inc. must pay all costs of transfer. Venue does not lie in San Francisco. Defendant has shown that San Francisco is not the proper venue for this case since its residence is in Los Angeles and there is no connection between this lawsuit and San Francisco other than State Compensation Insurance Fund has an office in this county. There has been no showing that State Fund's San Francisco office has anything to do with this case. Moreover, plaintiff fails to explain why it filed this lawsuit in San Francisco when it had previously filed a very similar lawsuit in Los Angeles. Defendant's request for attorney's fees and costs is denied because it did not seek a stipulation to transfer the case to Los Angeles prior to filing this motion and it has not shown that plaintiff knew that State Fund's San Francisco office had nothing to do with this case. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
